If a jujube tree and a Rohita tree are joined together with or
without an ant-hill nearby, there will be sweet water 80 cubits below
at a distance of 3 cubits to their west. First a southerly vein will
come to light and then a northerly one. The signs here are : the stone
will be paste-like, next white clay, and at 2J cubits down a scorpion
will be seen.

If a jujube tree be joined with a Karira tree, there would be a
north-easterly vein of copious water at a depth of 90 cubits and at a
distance of three cubits to the west of the tree.
